name: Business Partnership Agreement
description: A legal agreement establishing a business partnership, defining the roles, contributions, profit sharing, and responsibilities of each partner.

sections.title: 1. Formation
sections.content: This Business Partnership Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} between {{partner_1_name}}, residing at {{partner_1_address}} ("Partner 1"), and {{partner_2_name}}, residing at {{partner_2_address}} ("Partner 2"), collectively referred to as the "Partners".

sections.title: 2. Business Name and Purpose
sections.content: The Partners agree to conduct business under the name {{business_name}}, with its principal place of business at {{business_address}}. The purpose of the partnership is: {{business_purpose}}.

sections.title: 3. Capital Contributions
4. Profit and Loss Sharing
sections.content:
The net profits and losses of the partnership shall be allocated as follows:
- Partner 1 ({{partner_1_name}}): {{partner_1_profit_share}}%
- Partner 2 ({{partner_2_name}}): {{partner_2_profit_share}}%

Distributions shall be made at such times and in such amounts as the Partners shall agree in writing.

sections.title: 5. Management and Decision Making
sections.content: All major business decisions, including capital expenditures above an agreed threshold, entering into contracts, and taking on debt, shall require the unanimous written consent of all Partners. Day-to-day operational decisions may be made by either Partner acting alone.

sections.title: 6. Banking and Accounting
sections.content: The partnership shall maintain a dedicated business bank account in the partnership's name. All partnership funds shall be deposited in this account. Proper books of account shall be maintained and each Partner shall have access to review them at any time.

sections.title: 7. Partner Duties
sections.content: Each Partner shall: (a) devote their best efforts to the partnership's business; (b) act in good faith toward the other Partners; (c) not engage in activities that conflict with the partnership's interests without prior written consent of all Partners.

sections.title: 8. Transfer of Partnership Interest
sections.content: No Partner may transfer, assign, or encumber their partnership interest without the prior written consent of all other Partners. Any attempted transfer in violation of this provision shall be null and void.

sections.title: 9. Dissolution
sections.content: The partnership may be dissolved by: (a) unanimous written agreement of all Partners; (b) the death, incapacity, or bankruptcy of a Partner; (c) a court order. Upon dissolution, the partnership's assets shall be liquidated, liabilities settled, and remaining proceeds distributed in accordance with each Partner's profit share percentage.

sections.title: 10. Dispute Resolution
sections.content: Any dispute arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall first be subject to good-faith negotiation between the Partners. If unresolved within 30 days, the dispute shall be submitted to mediation, and if still unresolved, to binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the applicable arbitration body.

sections.title: 11. Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{governing_law}}.

sections.title: Signatures
sections.content:
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Partnership Agreement as of the date first written above.

{{partner_1_name}} (Partner 1)
Signature: _______________________
Date: ____________________________

{{partner_2_name}} (Partner 2)
Signature: _______________________
Date: ____________________________
